title: Dismantle and evaluate engine blocks and sub-assemblies
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Dismantle and evaluate engine blocks and sub-assemblies demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to dismantle engine block and sub-assembly

pcs.text: Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 Engine block and sub assembly dismantling information is sourced and interpreted1.3 Tools and measuring equipment are selected and checked for serviceability 1.4 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.5 Engine is set up for dismantling using appropriate lifting equipment and avoiding fluid spillage according to safety and environmental requirements1.6 Engine block and sub-assembly are cleaned according to safety and environmental procedures and relevant Australian standards, and positions of auxiliary equipment are recorded, including photographic evidence
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 Engine block and sub assembly dismantling information is sourced and interpreted1.3 Tools and measuring equipment are selected and checked for serviceability 1.4 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.5 Engine is set up for dismantling using appropriate lifting equipment and avoiding fluid spillage according to safety and environmental requirements1.6 Engine block and sub-assembly are cleaned according to safety and environmental procedures and relevant Australian standards, and positions of auxiliary equipment are recorded, including photographic evidence?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 Engine block and sub assembly dismantling information is sourced and interpreted1.3 Tools and measuring equipment are selected and checked for serviceability 1.4 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.5 Engine is set up for dismantling using appropriate lifting equipment and avoiding fluid spillage according to safety and environmental requirements1.6 Engine block and sub-assembly are cleaned according to safety and environmental procedures and relevant Australian standards, and positions of auxiliary equipment are recorded, including photographic evidence.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to dismantle engine block and sub-assembly

elements.title: Dismantle engine block and sub-assembly

pcs.text: Covers and ancillary components are removed, cleaned and stored according to workshop procedures2.2 Engine block and sub-assembly are dismantled according to safety requirements and laid out in a logical order using approved methods, tools and equipment2.3 Component parts are cleaned using appropriate cleaning agents for the type of material and kept in a logical order in preparation for evaluation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Covers and ancillary components are removed, cleaned and stored according to workshop procedures2.2 Engine block and sub-assembly are dismantled according to safety requirements and laid out in a logical order using approved methods, tools and equipment2.3 Component parts are cleaned using appropriate cleaning agents for the type of material and kept in a logical order in preparation for evaluation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Covers and ancillary components are removed, cleaned and stored according to workshop procedures2.2 Engine block and sub-assembly are dismantled according to safety requirements and laid out in a logical order using approved methods, tools and equipment2.3 Component parts are cleaned using appropriate cleaning agents for the type of material and kept in a logical order in preparation for evaluation.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Dismantle engine block and sub-assembly

elements.title: Determine repair procedures

pcs.text: Engine block and sub-assembly are inspected, measured and tested against manufacturer specifications and tolerances and according to workplace procedures and safety requirements3.2 Engine block and sub-assembly are evaluated and repair requirements are determined and reported according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Engine block and sub-assembly are inspected, measured and tested against manufacturer specifications and tolerances and according to workplace procedures and safety requirements3.2 Engine block and sub-assembly are evaluated and repair requirements are determined and reported according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Engine block and sub-assembly are inspected, measured and tested against manufacturer specifications and tolerances and according to workplace procedures and safety requirements3.2 Engine block and sub-assembly are evaluated and repair requirements are determined and reported according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Determine repair procedures

elements.title: Complete dismantle and evaluation processes

pcs.text: Final inspection is made to ensure finished work complies with workplace requirements4.2 Bright surfaces are treated with rust prevention solution and engine block and sub-assembly are prepared for further process or storage according to workplace procedures4.3 Work area is cleaned, waste and non-recyclable materials are disposed of, and recyclable material is collected4.4 Workplace documentation is processed according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Final inspection is made to ensure finished work complies with workplace requirements4.2 Bright surfaces are treated with rust prevention solution and engine block and sub-assembly are prepared for further process or storage according to workplace procedures4.3 Work area is cleaned, waste and non-recyclable materials are disposed of, and recyclable material is collected4.4 Workplace documentation is processed according to workplace procedures?
